Croma, a Tata product, is an exceptional destination for all your electrical and electronics needs.
With a wide range of products available both in-store and on their user-friendly online website, Croma offers a seamless shopping experience.
The collection of electrical and electronics items at Croma is truly impressive.
Whether youre looking for the latest smartphones, laptops, televisions, kitchen appliances, or any other tech gadget, Croma has you covered.
They stock an extensive array of products from renowned brands, ensuring that customers have access to top-quality options.
What sets Croma apart is its commitment to customer satisfaction.
The knowledgeable and friendly staff are always ready to assist and provide expert guidance to help you make informed decisions.
They go the extra mile to understand your requirements and suggest products that best suit your needs, ensuring a personalized shopping experience.
The convenience of shopping at Croma is further enhanced by their user-friendly online website.
You can browse through their extensive catalog, compare prices, read customer reviews, and make purchases from the comfort of your own home.
The website offers a seamless online shopping experience, with secure payment options and reliable delivery services.
As a Tata product, Croma upholds the values of trust and reliability associated with the brand.
They prioritize customer satisfaction by offering competitive pricing, regular discounts, and exclusive deals.
The after-sales service provided by Croma is also commendable, with efficient customer support to address any concerns or queries.
In conclusion, Croma is a trusted destination for electrical and electronics items.
With an impressive collection, excellent customer service, and a user-friendly online website, Croma ensures a hassle-free shopping experience.
Whether you prefer to visit their physical stores or explore their online platform, you can rely on Croma to fulfill all your tech needs

Reliance Digital has consistently proven to be a reliable destination for all things tech
The vast array of products, from smartphones to home appliances, ensures that youll find what youre looking for
The staff is knowledgeable and ready to assist without being pushy
The stores organized layout makes browsing easy, and the prices are competitive
The after-sales service is commendable, ensuring that any issues are addressed promptly
The warranty and return policies provide an added layer of assurance for customers
While the store might not have the charm of smaller, specialized shops, the sheer convenience and reliability of Reliance Digital make it a go-to choice for tech enthusiasts
Overall, a solid option for anyone seeking a hassle-free tech shopping experience

highlights: Bought my laptop three four years ago  and it is still working fine.
I bought a TV, Laptop, Home Theater its very good and need custom satisfaction.
Bought Haier 5 star ac from them a year back.
I bought a AC in the month of February 2023 and sales person said, they give the filter free for AC while the time of enquiry.
Salespersons are not giving correct information on the installation of products.
The store manager himself came and told the same earlier price we agreed up on.
Store manager nice to talk to me.
The store manager and discovered that since the issue was raised on Saturday, a replacement will be delivered on Monday.
Customer care recommended clients to visit the store instead of simply flatly denying that the stabiliser concerns would not be handled through a complaint.
I questioned the store manager about any delays, and he replied that it might take another day.
Dont give your phone number to the salespersons during enquiry.
They will place reapeted calls and torture you until you buy that product.
Worst staff service, they behaved very rude and aggressive..they dont even know to handle an innocent customer who comes with zero knowledge about a product.
The environment is very bad as they dont switch on the AC and there is no ventilation.
The store manager rudely with me....
They promised us that the installation will come in 4k, but while installing, they charged 7k.
AC delivery next day it will delivered but installation after 5 days that also no problem for me.
They said after 6 month of purchase one service for general cleaning is available.
Giving false commitment to customers. Delivery and installation takes lots of time.
They sold an AC to me which runs like a Fan.
I dont know what to say, I am out of words , first they delayed delivery and then delayed installation and now after installation AC is not working.
I bought Haier AC on 7th May 24.
And very less products only available in showroom.
But I choose Haier AC with wifi model but delivery in my home wrong model sent it to me.
I visited showroom more the 3 times and Showroom mobile most of time no one pickup the calls.
Very Disappointment because same showroom I bought TV, Laptop, Home Theater its very good and need custom satisfaction.
But now I really feel bad.

Viveks is a well-known chain of electronics and home appliances stores based in Chennai, India. Established in 1965, Viveks has grown to become a trusted retailer for a wide range of products including kitchen appliances, televisions, refrigerators, washing machines, air conditioners, and more. They have multiple branches across Chennai and other cities in Tamil Nadu. For more specific information such as store locations, product offerings, or current promotions, you can visit the official Viveks website or contact their customer service. A regular customer to Viveks, we have bought most of the electrical appliances there. About showroom:Pros- Has almost all branded electrical appliances, non stick utensils, flasks, etc. Cons- No much parking space in front of the shop,could park some 10 bikes at a time.Not sure if they have any valet parking facility. About purchase:  Mr. Vasu has always helped us buy a better option , as he understands our actual requirement and suggest based on that, irrespective of the purchase amount. Mr. Giri was full of smiles and  gave a very good explanation on the various models of TV. Both of them were very patient and explained all our doubts. The person who explained about refrigerator(name not known) also was very helpful. They have given reasonably good offers also. After purchase experience:  Not that so good. Though they delivered the product the very next day, installation was done a day later and that too after multiple follow ups and with no proper response

I recently purchased a TV, an air conditioner, and a washing machine from Viveks, and my experience was excellent. The store offers a wide selection of high-quality products, and the customer service is outstanding. I was setting up a new house, and despite buying products from multiple companies, Branch Manager Mohammed Rafi ensured everything was handled smoothly. He managed the delivery timing perfectly, making sure everything arrived within the given timeframe. Last-mile delivery is a crucial part of the customer experience, and I m glad Mohammed Rafi understood its importance and delivered as promised. The staff were patient, attentive, and never made me feel rushed or pressured. They provided practical tips for using the appliances, ensuring I could make the best use of my new purchases. Additionally, the after-sales support has been prompt and efficient. Overall, Viveks has consistently provided me with great products and exceptional service. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable and customer-focused retail.
